data.title: Thailand SEC to block Bybit, 1000X, CoinEx, OKX and XT platforms in June
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Thai SEC announced that it will block cryptocurrency exchanges Bybit, 1000X, CoinEx, OKX and XT platforms on June 28, 2025, and file legal proceedings against them, accusing them of committing acts classified as unlicensed digital asset business operators.

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launches RDO and miffy
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched BNB Smart Chain and Solana ecosystem's MEME tokens RDO, miffy.
Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use the spot account (USDT/USDC) in the Bitget App to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.

data.title: Synthetix restores sUSD anchor to $1, will increase 420 pool collateral requirements
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Synthetix announced that its stablecoin sUSD will be restored to the $1 target, and will require SNX debt mortgagees to increase the sUSD mortgage ratio in the 420 pool from 10% to 20% from 23:59 UTC on June 2, otherwise the debt exemption will be suspended. Previously, due to user selling, sUSD once fell to $0.70. The official said that restoring the anchor will help promote the SIP-420 proposal and the subsequent deployment of the v4 contract on the Ethereum mainnet.

data.title: Analysis: The US will release the PCE index tonight, and the Fed's interest rate cut window may be closing
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The United States will release the Federal Reserve's favorite inflation indicator tonight - the personal consumption expenditure price index (PCE). The market expects that the PCE price index in April may increase by only 0.1% month-on-month, and the year-on-year growth rate will drop from 2.3% to 2.2%, approaching the level before the COVID-19 pandemic. In terms of core, the core PCE, which excludes fluctuations in food and energy prices, is expected to grow by 0.1% month-on-month, but the year-on-year growth rate will remain at a high level of 2.6%.
At present, the importance of PCE is because the Federal Reserve prefers to use it to measure the underlying trend of inflation.
Analysis points out that the inflationary effects of the Trump administration's tariffs have just begun to penetrate the US economy. Most economists predict that even if Trump relaxes some tariffs, inflation may still rebound to 3% in a few months.
With the US core PCE stuck in the 2.8%-2.6% range for six consecutive months, the Fed's interest rate cut window is closing. Although some Fed officials remain positive about rate cuts, the interest rate futures market shows that traders' forecasts for the probability of a rate cut in September have dropped sharply to 47% from 68% a week ago. They also expect the US economy to be at the crossroads of a new inflation cycle. (Jinshi)

data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin Selling Pressure Weak As Binance Inflows Stay Subdued – Can BTC Sustain Its Rally?
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) continues to trade close to its new all-time high (ATH) of $111,980, set earlier this week. While some argue that the top digital asset may be running out of steam, Binance exchange flow data suggests that certain investor groups are reluctant to sell their BTC just yet, expecting further upside. Bitcoin Inflows To Binance Suggest Further Upside Possible According to a recent CryptoQuant Quicktake post by on-chain analyst Darkfost, analyzing BTC inflows to Binance from both short-term holders (STHs) and long-term holders (LTHs) can offer meaningful insights into selling pressure and its potential impact on price. Related Reading: Bitcoin Eyeing $112,000 After Bullish Double Bottom Breakout, Analyst Says Darkfost noted that STHs tend to be the most reactive and emotionally driven investor group when it comes to market movements
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-selling-pressure-weak-as-binance-inflows-stay-subdued-can-btc-sustain-its-rally/

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin's daily inflows reach $1.8 billion, close to the peak of the last bull market
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoQuant analyst Axel Adler Jr wrote on the X platform that the demand for Bitcoin market is approaching the peak level of the last bull market.
Currently, an average of about $1.8 billion of new funds flow into the market every day, which is comparable to the level when the price of Bitcoin hit $64,000 in November 2021. In this cycle, the largest inflows occurred when the price of Bitcoin reached $73,000 (peak $3.6 billion) and $92,000 (peak $4.5 billion). Axel Adler Jr said that this indicator shows that even after setting a record high, investors still maintain their willingness to deploy large amounts of funds.

data.title: SEC holds meeting with Kraken parent company to discuss crypto asset regulation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the memorandum on the SEC official website, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Crypto Assets Working Group held a meeting with representatives of Payward, Inc. (Kraken's parent company) to discuss issues related to crypto asset regulation. The meeting topics included the tokenization of traditional assets and how they are promoted in other jurisdictions, feasible paths to promote tokenization in the United States, and different types of "staking as a service", potential benefits to the ecosystem, and how the SEC can provide regulatory clarity for related businesses under its existing authority.

data.title: Binance Assists in Global Takedown of Kidflix, a Major Child Exploitation Platform
data.description:
Binance has played a crucial role in the global dismantling of Kidflix, one of the largest child exploitation networks in history. The takedown was part of “Operation Stream,” a joint law enforcement initiative led by German and Dutch authorities and coordinated by Europol. On March 11, 2025, the Kidflix platform — which operated with nearly 1. 8 million registered users globally — was taken offline
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/24928682923402?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS
